//: Reference shape for appsettings.Development.json (gitignored). Copy this file to appsettings.Development.json and customize. Per-developer log-level tweaks and the Seq sink config live here so they don't leak into committed defaults.

Logging.//Seq: Structured-log sink. Point at the dockerized Seq from docker-compose.yml. Blank or remove ServerUrl to disable. Hard-gated on IsDevelopment() in Program.cs — never ships logs off-host in production.
